summary: Frontend-only testing of CP y PCPLDA Octavio Mendoza landing page. All major sections verified and functional.
context_for_next_testing_agent: First test iteration. All sections passed. Static landing page in Spanish. No backend. WhatsApp, email, Google Maps embedded all visible and correct.

sections_tested.navbar: PASS - Logo OM, all 6 nav links (Inicio, Nosotros, Servicios, Precios, Blog, Contacto), Agendar Asesoría button present
sections_tested.hero: PASS - Slogan visible, stats 22+/8/PLD/100% present, WhatsApp and Nuestros Servicios buttons
sections_tested.services: PASS - All 8 service cards found, card expand/collapse works on click
sections_tested.pricing: PASS - 6 pricing cards visible, paquetes combinados banner present
sections_tested.contact: PASS - WhatsApp (+52 961 177 0435), email (octaviomendoza1704@gmail.com), phone, address, Google Maps embedded
sections_tested.footer: PASS - Nav links, services links, contact info, copyright 2026 present
